tasks.label: CMake Build
tasks.command: if [ -f /.dockerenv ]; then P=container; else P=vscode; fi; cmake --preset $P && cmake --build --preset $P

tasks.label: Run Tests
tasks.command: if [ -f /.dockerenv ]; then P=container; else P=vscode; fi; cmake --preset $P && cmake --build --preset $P && ctest --preset $P
